title: Disney Spidey Spray Pen Set - Battery-Operated Airbrush Pens & Stencil Set, 19-Piece with Felt Tip Markers, Templates - Creative Arts & Crafts Colouring Kit for Children 4+ - Marvel Friends Themed Fun
features: Complete Creative Kit: This airbrush paint set includes 6 marker pens, 6 Spidey-themed stencils, and 6 A4 sheets - everything young artists need to create stunning Spidey and his Amazing Friends colouring masterpieces with a simple press of a button

Easy Airbrush Action: These art pens become magical tools - just insert the colouring pens for kids into the battery-powered sprayer, aim at your canvas, and watch as colours flow smoothly across the page with a gentle press

Paint Your Own Spidey & Friends:: These felt tip pens for children pair with 6 different Marvel-inspired stencils, letting young artists bring their favorite web-slinging hero to life through colorful, eye-catching artwork

Mix and Match Colours: These children's pens allow endless creative possibilities - blend shades, layer colours, and customise each design. Young artists create new combinations and effects with each masterpiece

Simple Setup and Use: These brush pens work instantly - no mess or complicated instructions. Just add batteries to the sprayer, select a template and colour, then start creating amazing airbrushed artwork (batteries not included)
description: Turn ordinary drawings into vibrant masterpieces with this Spider-Man themed art set for kids. The innovative airbrush system lets young artists create stunning effects - simply insert the fun pens into the sprayer, press the button, and watch the colours flow across the page. With 6 detailed stencils featuring favourite Marvel characters, creating impressive artwork is effortless. The set includes 6 vivid art markers, an electronic sprayer, and A4 sheets to get started right away. This creative airbrush kit brings a whole new dimension to children's art, making it an exciting gift for any young superhero fan aged 3 and up. Just add 2 AA batteries and let their imagination soar. Note: batteries not included. -Battery-powered airbrush sprayer with 6 coloured pens -6 Spidey and friends character stencils included -Simple press-button colouring system -6 A4 sheets for artwork -Suitable for ages 4 and above
